theme_overview.rationale: Deep obsidian dark mode acts as an energy-efficient, high-contrast canvas for mobile screens. Gold/Amber accents add warmth, evoking African heritage and premium AI intelligence without being garish. Large touch targets ensure accessibility.

spacing_and_layout.container: w-full max-w-md mx-auto h-[100dvh] flex flex-col bg-[#0A0908] overflow-hidden relative
spacing_and_layout.touch_targets: Minimum 48px height for all interactive elements (h-12 to h-16).

components_instructions.BottomNavigation: Fixed to bottom, glassmorphism effect (backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#0A0908]/80 border-t border-zinc-800). 4 equal tabs. Active tab icon turns Gold (#FFC107) with a subtle dot indicator below.
components_instructions.QuickActionGrid: Bento-style grid (grid-cols-2 gap-4). Cards use bg-card, rounded-2xl, border border-border/50. Hover/Active state adds a subtle amber inner glow.
components_instructions.AIChatBubble: Border-radius rounded-2xl rounded-tl-sm. Uses ai_bubble_bg and ai_bubble_border. Text is off-white.
components_instructions.InputArea: Fixed above bottom nav. Uses Shadcn Input but rounded-full h-14 bg-zinc-900 border-zinc-700. Send button is a Gold circle with dark icon.
components_instructions.LanguageSelector: Shadcn Dropdown or segmented control customized with dark styling and gold active states.

motion_and_interactions.tap_feedback: All buttons scale down to 0.95 on active (Tailwind: active:scale-95 transition-transform).
motion_and_interactions.transitions: Page transitions use Framer Motion slide-in or simple opacity fades.

icons.size: w-6 h-6 for nav, w-8 h-8 for quick actions

laila_avatar.description: 3D Gold AI Avatar for Laila, use in chat header and splash screen.

background_texture.description: Subtle dark gold background mesh. Use as absolute positioned background with opacity-20 behind the main chat/home screens.

entrepreneur_card.description: African entrepreneur working. Use for 'Work & Money' / CV Builder section card header.

student_card.description: African teacher/students in class. Use for 'Study & Homework' section card header.

testing.attributes: Add data-testid to all interactable elements (e.g., data-testid='bottom-nav-chat', data-testid='send-message-btn').
